# Erdős problems frontier — agent onboarding (generated by `vela onboard`; do not edit)

The frontier record is the source of truth. Your output is a state
transition or it is nothing: a witness that passes `vela reproduce`,
a finding proposed through the Frontier PR flow, a signed attempt
(failures included), or a precise obstruction. Strategy prose does
not move the frontier.

**Done means `vela gate` passes** (`vela check examples/erdos-problems` replay-verified
+ `vela reproduce examples/erdos-problems` all witnesses green).

## Entry contract
Pull a task packet before working: `vela serve examples/erdos-problems` then the
`task_packet` tool with a problem number — it carries allowed
outputs mapped to verifiers, leases, and failed routes.

## Do not re-grind (banked routes)
- the reservoir criterion verified on the BEGL case {3,4,7}, k=1. (vf_0bdc86f4d9f9ea18)
- a partial CRT covering certificate (m + 20 prime rows, ~0.7467 density) verified (crt_partial_cover). (vf_0d4ac181db98ceaa)
- three delta=1 examples beyond ELS93 (k=106/126/129) verified; the density model leans finite. (vf_279e997d3b3da2ee)
- the 14 ELS exceptions enumerated provably-complete to k<=40 (binom_exception_enum). (vf_2d4edfce58578092)
- f(n)=min gcd(n,C(n,k)) recomputed for the cited cases (semiprime and prime-power families). (vf_2db3437d1512c222)
- the congruence-barrier construction verified. (vf_523a610fc3947249)
- the GPT-Pro reduction is banked and re-verified (obstruction map: HONEST, no solve). (vf_7cb1a5b07207120e)
- the banked unimodality result for the tree/forest case verified (frozen kernel). (vf_7eba52ea8a9bc742)
- the counting step of the upper bound corroborated numerically. (vf_a9a5b1e0dbdc9da4)
- the prime / forced-divisor channel is provably exhausted (banked obstruction_map + Erdos647Obstruction.lean). (vf_ac4c84ea5e608bb7)
- explicit cut-equality certificates verified for every k in 2..14 (interval_product witnesses). (vf_ae08f178d51bb99e)
- f(M_K-1) > K verified for K=3..12 via Kummer no-carry (effective, subsequential lower bound). (vf_ba50ac1f1f60aa27)
- the unconditional Mordell-curve reduction + Pell correction + the two analytic walls verified. (vf_cd5fe218ed92cc31)
- K25 balanced-coloring construction known; the K26 finite case is the first open case and reduces to a SAT instance. (vf_da8d51a6cae5ec11)
- the central-doubling reduction + CRT obstruction verified; the two arms provably do not meet. (vf_eb741f9becc60879)
- per-fixed-A exact decision certificates (7500+ antichains, zero counterexamples). (vf_ef7066987d658f0e)

## Open targets
- uniform L-syndeticity across all cases remains open. (vf_0bdc86f4d9f9ea18)
- extend to a full cover (the verified rows do not cover all residues). (vf_0d4ac181db98ceaa)
- prove finiteness of the delta=1 deficiency cases (the density argument is heuristic, not a proof). (vf_279e997d3b3da2ee)
- extend the complete enumeration / prove finiteness of the exception set for all k. (vf_2d4edfce58578092)
- characterize f(n) in general beyond the verified families. (vf_2db3437d1512c222)
- the unconditional bound remains open. (vf_523a610fc3947249)
- the reduction does not solve #396; the solve remains open. (vf_7cb1a5b07207120e)
- the general Alavi-Erdos unimodality conjecture is open. (vf_7eba52ea8a9bc742)
- the full upper bound is not established by the numerics alone. (vf_a9a5b1e0dbdc9da4)
- a different channel is required; the prime channel cannot close it (stop grinding it). (vf_ac4c84ea5e608bb7)
- the problem asks for EVERY k; a uniform construction or proof for all k remains open. (vf_ae08f178d51bb99e)
- promote the subsequential bound to the full claim for all n. (vf_ba50ac1f1f60aa27)
- the analytic walls block an unconditional bound; closing them is open. (vf_cd5fe218ed92cc31)
- produce the LRAT/RAT certificate for the K26 SAT encoding and re-check it with `vela reproduce` (unsat_cert); the symmetry-breaking step needs RAT, beyond the current RUP checker. (vf_da8d51a6cae5ec11)
- the gap between the arms is the open obstruction. (vf_eb741f9becc60879)
- no uniform proof: the per-A certificates do not combine into a statement for all A. (vf_ef7066987d658f0e)

## Rules
- An agent may propose; only a key-holding human accepts.
- Lease before long work: `vela claim examples/erdos-problems <obligation-id> --ttl 86400 …`.
- Park scratch artifacts with `vela stash`; reference vsx_ hashes.
- Deposit a signed attempt even when you fail — especially when you fail.
